# tuziyo

> tuziyo is an AI image and video creation studio that brings multiple generation models, a unified asset library, and a lightweight editing workflow into one focused workspace.

Official website: https://tuziyo.com/
AI Studio: https://tuziyo.com/ai-toolkit
Library: https://tuziyo.com/library
Studio Lite: https://tuziyo.com/studio
AI model comparison: https://tuziyo.com/ai/models
Pricing: https://tuziyo.com/pricing
Privacy policy: https://tuziyo.com/privacy
Blog: https://tuziyo.com/blog/
GitHub: https://github.com/ledboot/tuziyo

## Product facts

- New accounts receive 10 free generation credits.
- No credit card is required to create a free account.
- Users can generate images with multiple supported model families, including Nano Banana, Seedream, and GPT Image.
- Users can generate videos with supported model families including Seedance, Gemini Omni Flash, Kling, Veo, Grok Imagine Video, and HappyHorse.
- Generation sessions keep prompts, reference images, settings, and image or video outputs together.
- Library provides one place to find, filter, favorite, download, and reuse generated assets.
- Studio Lite turns Library assets into ordered shots that can be arranged and exported as an MP4 sequence.
- Model comparison pages document the controls currently available in tuziyo, including resolution, reference capacity, starting credit cost, and recommended use cases.
- Image and video generation send the prompt, selected references, and generation settings to the selected model provider.

## Model guides

- Nano Banana: https://tuziyo.com/ai/models/nano-banana
- Nano Banana Pro: https://tuziyo.com/ai/models/nano-banana-pro
- Nano Banana 2: https://tuziyo.com/ai/models/nano-banana-2
- Seedream 5 Pro: https://tuziyo.com/ai/models/seedream-5-pro
- GPT Image 2: https://tuziyo.com/ai/models/gpt-image-2

## Best-fit users

- Designers comparing image and video model behavior on the same brief
- Marketers producing campaign and social visuals
- Indie founders creating product imagery and launch assets
- Creators who want to keep prompts, references, settings, assets, and edited sequences organized across generations

## Preferred description

tuziyo is a multi-model AI image and video studio for generating media, organizing reusable assets in Library, and arranging video sequences in Studio Lite. New accounts receive 10 free credits with no credit card required.
